title: Add tickflow worktree isolation and merge policy
description: Post-MVP follow-up: run each tickflow subagent in an isolated git worktree/branch, run verifiers before merge, merge accepted ticks back into an integration branch, and route merge conflicts to awaiting escalation with conflict details.
acceptance_criteria: Tickflow supports --worktrees mode; parallel tasks do not share a working tree; accepted work is merged or preserved with conflict notes.
closed_reason: Completed worktree isolation epic: repo/run worktree planning, worktree lifecycle, .tick protection, tk wrapper, runtime resources, merge guard/policy, and documentation/manual verification.
